behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert existence of specific helper function names 'appendTitleSuffix' (test_appendTitleSuffix_function_exists) and 'getTitleString' (test_getTitleString_function_exists), but instruction.md never mentions these names.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and three cases to handle but does not specify the fix implementation or helper names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_appendTitleSuffix_function_exists and test_getTitleString_function_exists require gold-specific helper function names; a correct alternative fix using different names (e.g., 'applySuffix', 'extractTitle') would fail these structural grep checks.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests invoke vitest to execute generateMetadata and check behavioral outputs; only two are text-grep checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2P tests check concrete expected strings like 'Dashboard - My CMS' and object structure with default/template fields; stubs returning defaults would not satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the three cases (string, default/template, absolute) and titleSuffix handling as described in instruction.md.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings explaining fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass intent.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output schema required.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names look consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the utility file for the bug, which is appropriate scoping, and doesn't give line-level hints.
